Brady Web SDK license information
=================================

Vendored file: bundle.js
Source bundle URL: https://sdk.bradyid.com/bundle.js
Fetched: 2026-06-23

The minified bundle references this sidecar with:

    /*! For license information please see bundle.js.LICENSE.txt */

The matching sidecar was not available from Brady's CDN at:

    https://sdk.bradyid.com/bundle.js.LICENSE.txt

Brady publishes the SDK license terms in the Brady SDK Manual:

    https://sdk.bradyid.com/licences/

The npm package documented by Brady, brady-web-sdk, was unpublished when this
bundle was vendored, so the package registry did not provide a distributable
license file or tarball to preserve alongside the bundle.
